original_image_tags: A small, rectangular, off-white or light-colored card, possibly an index card or routing slip, oriented horizontally. The card shows aging with slight discoloration or spotting, particularly a brownish spot near the center-bottom edge. A vertical dotted line appears on the left side. The card contains handwritten text in dark ink.

elements.description: Handwritten note on an off-white piece of paper. Text reads: 'Please confirm publication or return forms with reason for refusal. Thank you. Missouri Filter Center ICARF'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content: an off-white piece of paper with handwritten text, and while Description B provides a verbatim quote that A omits, there is no contradiction in the visual claims made by both sides.
